steps.title: Use the shaded region
steps.content: A solution to the graphed inequality is any ordered pair that lies in the shaded region.

steps.title: Check the listed points
steps.content:
From the graph, $(0,-4)$, $(0,4)$, and $(-4,0)$ are outside the shaded region. The point $(4,0)$ is inside the shaded region.
The answer is D.
